de.uka.ilkd.key.pp

Interface SequentPrintFilter

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    IdentitySequentPrintFilter

    public interface SequentPrintFilter
    Filter a given sequent to prepare it for the SequentPrinter class by adjusting constraints, deleting formulas, etc.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ImmutableList<SequentPrintFilterEntry> getAntec()
      Get the formulas of the filtered sequent and the constraints to use for instantiating metavariables when printing
      Sequent getSequent() 
      ImmutableList<SequentPrintFilterEntry> getSucc()
